name: sidebar-group-collapsible
visual_summary: A collapsible sidebar group component allowing developers to create expandable content sections in their applications. This component is useful when implementing navigations, menus, or additional context within a sidebar. It enhances user experience by providing a compact and space-saving way to disclose and display supplementary information.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-group-collapsible
Description: A collapsible sidebar group component allowing developers to create expandable content sections in their applications. This component is useful when implementing navigations, menus, or additional context within a sidebar. It enhances user experience by providing a compact and space-saving way to disclose and display supplementary information.
Style: modular, responsive, material-design-inspired
Interactions: click, expand, collapse
Tags: sidebar, collapsible, group, navigation, menus

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
